name: beads
title: Beads
description: Mission control for Beads issue tracking — see ready work, create issues, and manage your agentic coding workflow across all projects
author: loudog

preferences.name: scanDirectories
preferences.title: Project Directories
preferences.description: Comma-separated paths to scan for beads-enabled projects (default: ~/code)

preferences.name: defaultEditor
preferences.title: Open Projects In
preferences.description: Which editor to open projects in

commands.name: beads-dashboard
commands.title: Beads Dashboard
commands.subtitle: Beads
commands.description: Cross-project mission control — see ready work, in-progress, blocked, and recently closed issues

commands.name: beads-create
commands.title: Create Bead
commands.subtitle: Beads
commands.description: File a new issue in any beads-enabled project with type, priority, and dependencies

commands.name: beads-whats-next
commands.title: What's Next?
commands.subtitle: Beads
commands.description: Instantly see and copy the highest priority ready issue across all projects

commands.name: beads-search
commands.title: Search Beads
commands.subtitle: Beads
commands.description: Full-text search across all beads-enabled projects

commands.name: beads-project
commands.title: Project Overview
commands.subtitle: Beads
commands.description: Deep dive into a single project — status, epics, stats, and health

commands.name: beads-menu-bar
commands.title: Beads Status
commands.subtitle: Beads
commands.description: Menu bar indicator showing ready work count across all projects
